name: USS Long Island (CVE 1)
events: 28 Oct 1943 Around 1400 L/28, HMAS Stuart (Lt.Cdr. N.A. Mackinnon, RAN) departed Townsville to make rendezvous with the escort carrier USS Long Island (T/Capt. J.H. McKay, USN).
Rendezvous was made around 0600 L/31 and the ships arrived at Brisbane around noon on 1 November 1943. (1)
2 Nov 1943 Around 1545 L/2, HMAS Stuart (Lt.Cdr. N.A. Mackinnon, RAN) departed Moreton Bay escorting the escort carrier USS Long Island (T/Capt. J.H. McKay, USN) eastwards.
